findings.observation: Prior cognition inheritance reduced redundant reads
findings.proposed_improvement: Formalize cognition delta field in compiled handoffs

findings.observation: Thor handoff prevented provider execution/model inference drift
findings.cause: WARNING block and forbidden_scope list in compiled handoff
findings.thor_finding: WARNING block pattern effective for boundary enforcement
findings.proposed_improvement: Auto-generate WARNING block from forbidden_scope entries
findings.evidence: probe.py: no generate/run/chat. smoke.py: no API key reads

findings.observation: Provider/security profile contract was sufficient but not formalized
findings.cause: No Provider-Probe profile in Thor library
findings.thor_finding: Dedicated provider_probe_profile.yaml would reduce manual spec work
findings.proposed_improvement: Add Provider-Probe profile to Thor profile library
findings.evidence: Probe result shape manually specified in handoff

findings.observation: Validator expectations were derived from acceptance gates
findings.cause: Handoff quality gate coverage check required
findings.thor_finding: Acceptance gate → validator derivation working well
findings.proposed_improvement: Auto-generate validator coverage table from acceptance gates

findings.observation: Forbidden claim phrases were explicit enough
findings.cause: FORBIDDEN_CLAIMS set + not_proven list in proof packet
findings.proposed_improvement: Validate not_proven completeness at handoff compile time
findings.evidence: Proof packet not_proven includes production_readiness, security_certification

findings.observation: Runtime security smoke expectations manually specified
findings.thor_finding: Thor security smoke profile would auto-generate marker lists
findings.proposed_improvement: Defer to FINAL-PR-05; add security smoke profile
findings.evidence: Smoke scanner self-exception discovered during implementation

findings.observation: Next worker packet not auto-generated from return report
findings.thor_finding: Manual return report → next packet gap remains
